title: Fix develop CI regressions blocking PR #167 review

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Created fix branch from develop to resolve failing feedback_contradictions tests blocking PR #167 review.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Patched feedback_contradictions scorecard resolution for non-UUID identifiers to use Scorecard.get_by_external_id (matching report-block conventions and test expectations). Running targeted tests now.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Reviewed history: commit 71515533 intentionally changed FeedbackContradictions scorecard lookup to get_by_name. Updated tests to mock get_by_name (not get_by_external_id) and rerunning failing tests.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented fix on branch fix/pr167-feedback-contradictions-develop and opened PR: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/168. Change updates feedback_contradictions tests to mock Scorecard.get_by_name, matching current source behavior on develop. Targeted failing tests now pass (3/3).

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: New CI failure reported from PR #167 unit-tests job (run 24425715051, job 71359116117). Investigating log and will patch accordingly.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Investigated run 24425715051/job 71359116117: failing test is dashboard/components/__tests__/guidelines-functionality.test.tsx (loading-state assertion). Applying deterministic test-only fix.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Fixed CI failure from PR #167 Dashboard Unit Tests: in guidelines-functionality test helper, await onSave during handleSave so loading-state assertion is deterministic. Local run: npm test -- --runInBand components/__tests__/guidelines-functionality.test.tsx (pass).

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Pushed follow-up commits to PR #168 for Dashboard Unit Tests failure from PR #167: c58f0907 (stabilize guidelines saving-state test) and 805fe849 (Kanbus artifacts).

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: PR #168 was already merged, so opened a new PR from fix/pr167-feedback-contradictions-develop to develop with post-merge follow-up commits (including c58f0907 dashboard test stabilization).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Taking over to restore develop CI per current request. Next: inspect latest failing GitHub Actions runs on develop, reproduce locally, patch on dedicated branch, and verify green checks before handoff.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Latest develop failure reproduced from GH run 24637486425: Dashboard Unit Tests typecheck error TS17001 in dashboard/components/OptimizerMetricsChart.tsx (duplicate tick prop on YAxis). Preparing minimal patch on bugfix/develop-ci-optimizer-chart-tick-props and validating with dashboard typecheck/tests.
